suggested_fixes: Add cudaGetLastError() or AT_CUDA_CHECK after each kernel launch.
Consider enforcing the d range in check_inputs for consistency with operator spec.
Align block size with metadata or adjust metadata to match actual block size (256).
For performance, consider using tiling or cooperative groups to improve memory coalescing.
warnings: No CUDA error checking after kernel launches; silent failures possible.
Block size used (256) differs from metadata (128); may affect occupancy.
Input validation does not enforce d in [3584, 4608] as per operator constraints.
Scalar memory access patterns may be inefficient for large d; consider using shared memory or vectorized loads.
